description: You are a paralegal at Whitmore & Associates Law Firm. Organize the inbox backlog for three active matters: Harrison v. Mercer (employment discrimination), DataVault Systems (patent infringement), and Chen Family Estate (administration). Create a folder structure under Local Folders to separate these cases and route each email to the correct case folder. Add the opposing counsel from the DataVault matter to the address book and configure a message filter to automatically route future emails from the district court clerk to a 'Court Notices' folder. Login: testuser@example.com (local account, no password needed).

injected_errors: All case emails mixed in Inbox with no folder structure
Opposing counsel (Marcus Webb) not in address book
No filter exists for court clerk emails
